folio.label: 200r
folio.l: ¢ It were ful hard , by ordre for to seyn

note.notetxt: 358Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: How manye wondres , Iúc for he~ wrougúte
But at the laste , to tellen short and pleyn
The sergeau~tez of the Toun of Rome , he~ sougúte
And hem , biforn Almache the päfect brougúte
Whicú hem opposed , and knew al here entente
And to the ymage , of Iubiter , hem sente
¢ And seide , who so wol nougút do sacéfise

note.notetxt: 365Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: Swap~ of his hed , this is myn sentence heere
A noon theise martirs , that I ©ow deuyse
Oon Maximë , that was an officere
Of the päfectes , and his cornyculere
Hem hente , & whan he fortú , the Seyntes ladde
Hi~ self he wep~ , for pitee æat he hadde
¢ Whan Maximë had herd , the Seyntes loore

note.notetxt: 372Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: He gat hi~ , of the Turmentours leue
And hadde he~ to his hous , w oute more
And witú here pächyng , er æ it were eue
They gonnen fro the tåmentours , to reue
And fro Maxime , and fro his folk echone
The false feitú , to trowe in god allone
¢ Cecile cam , whan it was woxen nygút

note.notetxt: 379Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: W Preestes , æ he~ cristened alle I feere
And afterward , whan day was woxen ligút
Cecile hi~ seide , witú a ful stedfast cheere
Now Cristes owne knygútes , leeue & deere
Cast al a wey , the werkes of derknesse
And armetú ©ow in armes , of brigútnesse
¢ ñe han forsothe , I don a gret bataille

note.notetxt: 386 Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be in cluded.Est

folio.l: ñoure cours is don , ©oure feitú haue ©e conserued
Gotú to the corone of lyf , æat may nat faile
The rigútful Iuge , whicú that ©e han serued
Shal ©eue it ©ow , as ©e han it deserued
And whan this thyng , was seid , as I deuyse
Men ledde he~ fortú , to don the sacrifise
¢ But whan they weren , to the place brougút

note.notetxt: 393Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: To tellen shortly , the conclusioun
They nolde encence , ne sacrifise rigút nougút
But on here knees , they setten he~ a doun
W humble herte , and sad deuociou~
And losten bothe here heuedes , in the place
Here soules wenten , to the kyng of grace
